name: Creatives on Creatives
overview: Creatives on Creatives is a project series dedicated to uplifting and empowering young creatives. In each episode, two creatives will sit down and interview each other about their craft and process, shining light on the realities of getting started in creative industries. Co-directed and produced by Erin Abdalla and Aaron Jacobs

trailers.title: Creatives on Creatives: A Conversation with Katie DeMartini and MATTEUS!
